data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of sending a failed inspection alert to the supervisor. However, the evidence provided only describes the system locking out the forklift and creating a maintenance ticket, without explicitly confirming that an alert is sent to the supervisor. This constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage as the specific alert mechanism is not evidenced in the provided information.
gaps: No evidence of a failed inspection alert being sent to the supervisor.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for supervisor alert mechanism
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that a failed inspection alert is sent to the supervisor when an inspection fails.
